name: Orchestrator.process evaluates simple numeric expression
description: Integration test: exercise CalculatorAgentOrchestrator.process end-to-end for a plain numeric expression. Uses agent.process(request_id, raw_expression='1+2*3', precision=3, show_steps=False, target_unit=None).
input: Call agent.process(request_id='test1', raw_expression='1+2*3', precision=3, show_steps=False, target_unit=None)
output: Payload dict with success True, human_text and structured_json containing computed result (7) and precision_used 3
success_criteria: Returned payload is a dict with 'success' == True
structured_json contains 'result' representing 7 (as float 7.0 or Decimal->float)
No security or parsing error codes present
error_scenarios: ERR_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION from MathEvaluator.evaluate if expression not parseable
Unexpected exceptions from sympy if SYMPY_AVAILABLE and evaluation fails
